title: corynephorus divaricatus subsp. macrantherus
intro: Corynephorus divaricatus subsp. macrantherus, also known as a grass species, is a type of plant native to South Africa. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is said to have health benefits such as aiding in wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Corynephorus divaricatus subsp. macrantherus can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, although its herbal preparations are not widely documented and should be used with caution.
